name: Fudge Mint Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt cocoa and margarine in a saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 10 chocolate-covered mints until melted.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs well.
4. Sift sugar into the egg mixture along with flour and salt; beat until smooth.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour the cocoa mixture into the egg mixture, then add flour mixture; beat well to combine.
7. Grease a large baking pan and pour the batter into it.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from oven and place remaining chocolate-covered mints on top of the brownies.
10. Return to oven briefly to melt the mints, then spread evenly over the top.
11. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
